decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing control spells and creatures to maintain board presence while disrupting opponent strategies. It includes a variety of removal spells like Burst Lightning and Traumatic Critique, as well as card draw options such as Opt and Sleight of Hand. The deck also features a mix of creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental to apply pressure and provide defense. The goal is to control the game tempo, manipulate the opponent's resources, and ultimately outvalue them with efficient spells and creatures.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on developing a fast and aggressive board presence using low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, supported by efficient removal like Erode and Seam Rip. The deck also includes cards like Gene Pollinator and Voice of Victory to fuel its aggression and push for lethal damage quickly. With a mix of creature pump spells and efficient attackers like Surrak, Elusive Hunter, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents early on and secure victories before the late game.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays with a low mana curve and a mix of direct damage spells and creatures that can quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck aims to control the board and pressure the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and burn spells, utilizing card draw and versatile spells to maintain momentum. The inclusion of versatile cards like Secret Identity and Impractical Joke add a layer of unpredictability to keep the opponent off balance. The key strategy is to maintain pressure and tempo, overwhelming the opponent before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on building a fast and aggressive board presence using low-cost creatures such as Bitterbloom Bearer and Dream Beavers. Supporting cards like Requiting Hex and Shoot the Sheriff provide removal and disruption, while Lord Skitter, Sewer King provides a powerful late-game threat. The mana base is streamlined with a mix of Swamp and Mudflat Village, allowing for consistent casting of spells. The overall game plan is to overwhelm the opponent with a constant stream of creatures and efficient removal spells.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through a combination of removal spells, counter spells, and card advantage. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while slowly building up resources and advantage to eventually win the game. The deck includes a variety of efficient removal spells, card draw spells, and counter spells to help control the board and maintain a strong position throughout the game. Through careful resource management and strategic play, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory.

This Golgari Aggro deck focuses on early creature aggression and disruption, utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Emeritus of Abundance to quickly build a board presence. The deck also includes removal spells like Maelstrom Pulse and Requiting Hex to deal with opposing threats. With cards like Duress and Shoot the Sheriff, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining pressure on the battlefield. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Ouroboroid and Ral Zarek, Guest Lecturer provides additional utility and card advantage to outpace opponents.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counterspells to control the game against opponents. It utilizes powerful spells like Jeskai Revelation and Combustion Technique to maintain card advantage and deal with threats efficiently. The deck also includes cards like Abandon Attachments and Stock Up to disrupt opponent's strategies and keep the board under control. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue opponents through resource management and careful decision-making, ultimately leading to victory through attrition and control of the game.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using efficient creatures and powerful spells in the Mono Green Aggro archetype. By using cards like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Mightform Harmonizer, this deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and pressure the opponent. With cards like Esper Origins and Surrak, Elusive Hunter providing additional support and evasion, this deck focuses on closing out the game quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and combat tricks. It utilizes a combination of efficient creatures like Sage of the Skies and Momo, Friendly Flier, along with cards like Practiced Offense and Erode to push through damage and control the battlefield. The deck also includes cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Quantum Riddler for card advantage and disruption, making it a versatile and formidable deck in a Standard 1 vs 1 setting.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By using efficient card draw and cheap spells, the deck aims to maintain a high tempo and pressure the opponent from the start. The combination of cheap threats like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, along with burn spells like Burst Lightning, allows the deck to quickly deplete the opponent's life total and win the game before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of counterspells like Spell Pierce adds an element of disruption to protect the deck's game plan.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to utilize low-cost aggressive creatures along with spells that can deal damage and control the board. Key components include cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent for direct damage, Slickshot Show-Off for card advantage, and Eddymurk Crab for defensive capabilities. By combining creature pressure with instant spells and card draw, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Opt and Secret Identity for card selection and manipulation to ensure a smooth and consistent gameplay experience.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It aims to control the game early with efficient removal and counterspells, while dealing direct damage and deploying threats to close out the game swiftly. The deck utilizes cards that draw additional cards or provide card advantage, enabling it to maintain momentum and apply consistent pressure. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive game plan by providing the necessary colors of mana as efficiently as possible.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent while maintaining card advantage through cantrips and card draw. By leveraging efficient spells and creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to establish early pressure and tempo to overwhelm the opponent. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Get Out provides disruption and helps control the battlefield. The mana base is optimized with a mix of dual lands and basic lands to ensure consistent casting of spells.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays with a combination of low-cost creatures and combat tricks to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing a mix of creatures with various abilities and spells to boost their power, the deck aims to deal damage early and often to secure a quick victory. The deck also includes some disruption elements to handle opposing threats and maintain pressure on the opponent. Overall, this deck aims to control the pace of the game and push for a fast win through aggressive tactics.

The main focus of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while utilizing various mana acceleration tools like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional power boosts to push through damage, while cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Demolition Field help control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Esper Origins and Escape Tunnel adds versatility and protection to the deck, allowing it to adapt to different matchups. Overall, the deck aims to maintain a fast and relentless pace to secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to play powerful cards like Earthbender Ascension and Esper Origins. It also utilizes creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo to apply pressure early in the game. Demolition Field and Mightform Harmonizer help to control the board and protect your creatures, while Escape Tunnel provides a way to protect key creatures from removal. The overall strategy is to overwhelm your opponent with efficient creatures and buffs to win the game quickly.
